'''Hayvlin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he commanded the [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]] stationed aboard the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Avenger/Legends|''Avenger'']].<ref name="CSWE" /> He led an assault on an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] base.<ref name="Death" />
